description_long: This object is a cylindrical bottle of Kiehl's Blue Astringent Herbal Lotion, featuring a vibrant blue body and a white cap. The bottle is made of smooth plastic and has a printed label with detailed product information, including branding and usage instructions. The front label displays the Kiehl's logo, product name, and a description in blue and black text. The cap is a screw-on type, also made of plastic, and is slightly domed at the top. The bottle's surface is glossy, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The overall design is clean and professional, with minimal graphic elements aside from the logo and text.
description: A blue cylindrical plastic bottle with a white screw-on cap, labeled as Kiehl's Blue Astringent Herbal Lotion. The bottle features a glossy finish and detailed printed text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Kiehl's logo, product name, and main label text on the blue bottle with a white cap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing additional label information and instructions, with the cap and blue bottle body visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back label with fine print, recycling symbols, and the full cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the edge of the front label, barcode, and a portion of the side label.
